name: io.github.yubinkim444/repo-memory
title: Repo Memory
description: Shared, git-tracked working memory for AI agents on the same codebase. .ai-memory/ directory committed to the repo holds facts, decisions, and gotchas. Five tools: get_repo_memory, add_fact, list_facts, add_decision, add_gotcha. No DB, no daemon — git is the sync layer.

environmentVariables.name: REPO_MEMORY_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the repository whose .ai-memory/ to read/write. Defaults to the current working directory.
